ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the team (e.g., CHI) */,
  "team_city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach for the team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_founded_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., F, C, G) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "game_venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-stat combination */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Home team score */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Away team score */,
  "home_rebounds" INTEGER /* Home team rebounds */,
  "away_rebounds" INTEGER /* Away team rebounds */,
  "home_assists" INTEGER /* Home team assists */,
  "away_assists" INTEGER /* Away team assists */,
  "home_steals" INTEGER /* Home team steals */,
  "away_steals" INTEGER /* Away team steals */,
  "home_blocks" INTEGER /* Home team blocks */,
  "away_blocks" INTEGER /* Away team blocks */,
  "home_turnovers" INTEGER /* Home team turnovers */,
  "away_turnovers" INTEGER /* Away team turnovers */,
  "home_fouls" INTEGER /* Home team fouls */,
  "away_fouls" INTEGER /* Away team fouls */,
  "home_fg2m" INTEGER /* Home team two-point field goals made */,
  "home_fg2a" INTEGER /* Home team two-point field goals attempted */,
  "home_fg2_pct" REAL /* Home team two-point field goal percentage */,
  "away_fg2m" INTEGER /* Away team two-point field goals made */,
  "away_fg2a" INTEGER /* Away team two-point field goals attempted */,
  "away_fg2_pct" REAL /* Away team two-point field goal percentage */,
  "home_turnover_detail" TEXT /* Detailed turnover statistics for the home team */,
  "away_turnover_detail" TEXT /* Detailed turnover statistics for the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., Point Guard, Shooting Guard, Small Forward, etc.) */,
  "position_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-position combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the player held the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game is scheduled */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, player) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was made */,
  "log_time" TEXT /* Time the log entry was made */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of the log (e.g., game start, game end, injury report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension report */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension started */,
  "suspension_description" TEXT /* Description of the suspension */,
  "suspension_length" INTEGER /* Length of the suspension */,
  "reason_for_suspension" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award (e.g., MVP, Defensive Player of the Year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
